1.trigger-point: Area Target and Reduce Enemy Defense

effects.description: The dawn sun lights a path for Karol’s invincible charge, lancing frontal enemies with Attack * 280% area damage and reducing their Defense by 25% for 2 seconds.
Karol launches a blistering series of strikes dealing Attack * 140% damage against enemies within a certain area.
The taste of victory gives sweet succor to the warrior, increasing Karol’s Attack by 12% for every fallen hero enemy while restoring 10% of Health.
A great offence is a great defense in the case of Karol’s cavalry diversions, reducing all troops’ damage taken by 20%.

2.trigger-point: Increase All Troops Damaege to Lancers and Infantry

effects.description: Karol knows exactly where enemy infantry are weakest against forces like his own, increasing all troops’ Damage Dealt to Lancers by 30% and 25% to Infantry.

3.trigger-point: Increase All Troops Attack and Defense

effects.effect-name: All Troops Attack + All Troops Defense
effects.description: Karol has turned the lessons of past brigades into a roadmap for victory, increasing all Troops’ Attack by 15% and Defense by 10%.

exploration.ability: The howling flutter of the Eagles of Karol is instantly recognizable, spurring an increase in friendly Squad Attack Speed by 14% and Movement Speed by 100% for 5 seconds with every Dawn Charge.
exploration.name: Eagle Flutter

expedition.ability: The Eagle Brigade of Karol often relies on combined arms, enhancing the Attack of rallied Troop by 15%.
expedition.name: Triumphant March
